name: chained-delegation
description: A task must pass from one peer to another without a lead pivot. The first peer scopes the change, hands off the implementation, and the second peer completes it.
lead_prompt_template: In {repo}, {assigned_to_a} should scope a two-file change, then hand it off directly to {assigned_to_b} with `handoff:` peer-DM language. {assigned_to_b} must implement and acknowledge the handoff. Do not route through team-lead.
